rationale: Author-of-record: commit 68fe576e delivers plan §Bead 1 Steps 1-7 and all Acceptance Criteria faithfully, nothing load-bearing skipped/added/reinterpreted. Step 1: Reviewer generalized (Model, Lens, Count *int, exported CountValue(), unexported model(), intp); DefaultConfig/PanelExpectedReviewers/validateOrchestration migrated to accessors; cmd/mindspec/config.go:149 renders CountValue(). Step 2: GatePanel, Panel.Gates/Note, Substitution.Substitutes, exported ordered PanelGateKeys, DefaultConfig empties, no loadUncached backfill, len(Gates)>0 predicate, KnownModels() seeded with exactly the six ids and never consulted by Load. Step 3: three resolvers with unknown-gate errors, raw threshold exprs, per-field own->adhoc/bead->global->default chain, deterministic expansion, cursor-start-0, explicit-lens-no-consume; worked example verified R1..R9. Step 4: PanelGateAdvisoryDefault four cases exact. Step 5: all R4(a)-(h) refusals with recovery lines incl. both inheritance shapes; no name-membership check. Step 6: six tests with exact AC names, all PASS; the deterministic-expansion falsifiability fixture correctly discriminates slot-index-mod, per-entry-rotation, and cursor-consuming-explicit-lens wrong impls. Step 7: core+workflow doc-sync complete (note-anchor + seeds present). Build green.
findings: Steps 1-7 all delivered and correct; verified against the diff line-by-line. go build ./... exits 0; the six named tests pass individually; go test ./cmd/mindspec green.

Slot-expansion worked example is exact: 9-reviewer all-lens-less panel expands R1 author-of-record .. R9 codebase-pin; the falsifiability fixture (explicit 'adversarial' entry preceding a lens-less entry) pins R3=author-of-record, which a wrong lens[slot-index%6] impl would render codebase-pin and thus fail. Matches plan step-6 mandate exactly.

R4 cross-field inheritance check delivered as one resolved formulation; both named shapes (global integer inherited by a smaller gate; bead integer inherited through adhoc->bead by a smaller reviewers-only adhoc) are present as refusal cases in TestLoad_RefusesPerGateKnobs.

MINOR (test-completeness, not a requirement failure): TestPanelGateResolvers_FallbackAndAdhoc asserts the reviewers-only-adhoc -> bead-threshold direction and threshold-only-final_review -> global-reviewers, but not the 'vice versa' the plan step-6 prose names (an adhoc threshold-only entry inheriting bead's resolved reviewers). The behavior IS correct and verified in resolveGateReviewers (adhoc with no reviewers falls through to bead), and AC4 (per-field chain, unknown-gate error, raw exprs only) is satisfied; only that one belt-and-suspenders assertion is absent. Worth adding in a later touch; does not warrant blocking.

PROCESS (not the diff): a concurrent reviewer left an untracked scratch file internal/config/zzz_s1_scratch_probe_test.go in the shared worktree during my run (git status was clean before). It fails the full-package `go test ./internal/config` because its TestS1_PerFieldIndependence_AdhocReviewersOnly_ThresholdFromBead builds a never-passable adhoc panel (2 reviewers inheriting bead threshold '3') and expects Load to succeed — the committed code correctly REFUSES it per R4, so the 'failure' actually confirms the diff. Not part of commit 68fe576e; left untouched (another agent's active work).
